summary: Iteration 38 - Provider Dashboard Restructuring. Backend: 11/11 tests PASS (100%). Frontend: All UI tests PASS. Dashboard (Panel) correctly shows only 2 tabs (Solicitudes Publicadas + Sucursales) with link to main profile. Mi Cuenta (/provider/account) correctly has 5 management tabs (Mi Perfil, Precios, Servicios, Galería, Redes Sociales). Amenities displayed in 2-column grid with icons. All new endpoints working.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/providers/my-profile - Returns full data (services, amenities, social_links)
PUT /api/providers/my-profile/amenities - Saves amenities array and persists correctly
PUT /api/providers/my-profile/social - Saves instagram, facebook, website and persists
PUT /api/providers/my-profile/services - Saves 3 service categories and persists
frontend_ui_tests: Provider Dashboard (/provider/dashboard) has 'Panel de Residencia' header
Dashboard shows only 2 tabs: 'Solicitudes Publicadas' and 'Sucursales'
Dashboard does NOT have tab-profile, tab-pricing, tab-amenities, tab-gallery, tab-social
'Ver mi perfil público' link visible on dashboard
'Sede Principal' card visible in Sucursales tab with link to profile
Mi Cuenta has 5 tabs: Mi Perfil, Precios, Servicios, Galería, Redes Sociales
Precios tab shows 3 categories: Residencias, Cuidado a Domicilio, Salud Mental
Each pricing category has price_from and description inputs
Servicios tab shows amenities in 2-column grid with icons
Amenity categories: Cuidado y Salud, Servicios e Instalaciones, Habitaciones, Actividades
All amenity buttons (geriatria, enfermeria, wifi, etc.) visible and clickable
Redes Sociales tab has Instagram, Facebook, Sitio Web inputs with icons

critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard restructuring correctly separates Panel (operations) from Mi Cuenta (settings)
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Amenities 2-column grid matches reference design with icons
Backend endpoints correctly save and return amenities/social_links
Note: Route is /provider/account not /mi-cuenta as mentioned in request - this is correct per App.js routing
seed_data_creation: Test amenities and social links saved during testing (non-destructive)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 38: Provider Dashboard restructuring COMPLETE. Dashboard at /provider/dashboard has 2 tabs (Solicitudes Publicadas, Sucursales) + link to public profile. Mi Cuenta at /provider/account has 5 management tabs (Mi Perfil, Precios, Servicios, Galería, Redes Sociales). Backend endpoints: PUT /api/providers/my-profile/amenities and PUT /api/providers/my-profile/social working correctly. Amenities shown in 2-column grid with icons. All tests passed.
